control_area: Autonomous agent tool authorization, approval gating, memory boundary, auditability, and launch-gate readiness
claims_allowed: A LangGraph-oriented autonomous-agent readiness lab foundation exists.
A starter tool registry and policy input examples exist.
The lab defines where identity, policy, approval, audit, and launch-gate controls should be tested.
claims_not_allowed: Agent tool authorization is enforced at runtime.
Human approval is enforced at runtime.
The autonomous agent is safe to launch.
Prompt injection against tools is fully mitigated.
open_blockers: No executable LangGraph runtime test harness has been run.
No runtime traces exist for allowed, denied, approval-required, or fail-closed tool calls.
next_required_action: Implement and run a minimal LangGraph test harness that emits runtime traces for allowed, denied, approval-required, and fail-closed tool-call scenarios.
